text:
On Sun, Sep 04, 2011 at 11:09:20PM +0800, wen heping wrote:
 > Do you success in regress test ?
 > 
 > wen
 
 We do not have regression-test: in Makefile and I did not add it manually.
 Therefore, tinderbox does not test it.
 
 Regards,
